message:
🌱 Add crossplane: Ability to patch into the key of an object value mission (#1641)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-4065-ability-to-patch-into-the-key-of-an-object-value",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: Ability to patch into the key of an object value",
+    "description": "Ability to patch into the key of an object value. Requested by 26+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\n\nPresently there is no way to patch the key name of an object value. Which makes any keys that are dynamic impossible to work with."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ability to patch into the key of an object value",
+        "description": "### Description of your changes\n\nThis PR adds support for convert transforms from JSON to object/array. This enables patching complex types (as proposed by  [here](https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3458#issuecomment-1383183093)) other than just simple ones and could be used [to patch\n```yaml\napiVersion: account.cloudflare.upbound.io/v1alpha1\nkind: APIToken\nmetadata:\n  namespace: default\n  name: cf-test-apitoken\nspec:\n  forProvider:\n    name: \"cf-test-apitoken\"\n    policy:\n      - effect: allow\n        permissionGroups:\n          - \"dafdsagrt42409uhfhjtnl44957\"\n        resources:\n          \"com.cloudflare.api.account.zone.${UUID IN HERE}\": \"*\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Ability to patch into the key of an object value\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Description of your changes\n\nThis PR adds support for convert transforms from JSON to object/array.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: account.cloudflare.upbound.io/v1alpha1\nkind: APIToken\nmetadata:\n  namespace: default\n  name: cf-test-apitoken\nspec:\n  forProvider:\n    name: \"cf-test-apitoken\"\n    policy:\n      - effect: allow\n        permissionGroups:\n          - \"dafdsagrt42409uhfhjtnl44957\"\n        resources:\n          \"com.cloudflare.api.account.zone.${UUID IN HERE}\": \"*\"",
+        "patches:\n    - type: FromCompositeFieldPath\n      fromFieldPath: spec.clusterName\n      toFieldPath: spec.forProvider.tags\n      transforms:\n      - type: string\n        string:\n          type: Format\n          fmt: '{\"kubernetes.io/cluster/%s\": \"true\"}'\n      - type: convert\n        convert:\n          toType: object\n          format: json",
+        "</details>\n\n<details>\n<summary>composition</summary>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "crossplane",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "crossplane"
+    ],

+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/issues/4065",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/4524"
+    },
+    "reactions": 26,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
